results.title: Applied AI Engineer Intern | Jobflarely
highlights:
Applied AI Engineer Intern | Jobflarely
...
# Applied AI Engineer Intern
...
Assurant is looking for an Applied AI Engineer Intern who has knowledge in AI, NLP, Generative AI, and Machine Learning (ML). This role predominantly involves hands-on development of AI/ML systems and will work within the Advanced Data Analytics GenAI team to build deeper AI‑powered analytical tools for our clients and teams, as well as implement innovative internal solutions for specific business challenges.
...
As an Applied AI Engineer Intern, you will help design, test, and refine AI models that support real business use cases. You will collaborate with data scientists, AI engineers, and delivery teams to contribute to practical, scalable AI applications.
...
- Support translation of AI solution designs into model code, APIs, and inference services.
- Help ensure AI deliverables align with business needs and model success metrics.
...
- Assist in framing business problems into machine learning or algorithmic tasks.
- Help prototype and test ML models and optimization approaches.
...
AI/ML Algorithm Implementation (25%)
...
- Build and refine machine learning models, including predictive models and foundational NLP/GenAI components.
- Contribute to algorithm performance improvements related to accuracy, latency, and computational efficiency.
...
- Work with structured and unstructured datasets to extract insights and features.
- Conduct experiments to validate models and evaluate model robustness.
- Assist with model monitoring and documentation.
...
- Stay current with emerging AI/ML techniques, especially in NLP, Generative AI, and deep learning.
- Prototype new methods under guidance from senior engineers and scientists.
...
- Collaborate with AI engineers, analysts, and product teams to support model integration.
- Assist in translating prototypes into scalable components within the broader system.
...
What are the requirements needed for this position?
...
- Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or a related field with coursework in AI/ML.
...
Experience & Skills
...
- Foundational knowledge of AI, NLP, Generative AI, and ML concepts.
- Hands‑-on experience with Python and ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit‑learn).
- Understanding of model evaluation methods and experimental design.
- Strong problem‑solving skills and intellectual curiosity.
...
- Exposure to GPU‑accelerated computing (e.g., CUDA frameworks).
- Familiarity with big‑data tools such as Spark, Kafka, or vector databases.
- Knowledge of LLMs, prompt engineering, or agent‑based AI systems.
- Strong communication and collaboration skills.

results.title: AI Data Science Intern | Hirevector
highlights: the design, development, and testing of models that solve real business problems. You’ll gain hands on experience working with large datasets, experimenting with algorithms, and contributing to AI solutions used across the company. This is a great opportunity for students who are curious, analytical, and excited about applying AI to real-world challenges. What will be my duties and responsibilities in this job? Business Alignment & Problem Scoping Help translate business questions into clear AI or data science problems. Support defining success metrics and understanding model use cases. Modeling, Algorithms & Experimentation Assist in building machine learning and optimization models. Run experiments, evaluate model performance, and identify areas for improvement. Explore and test new AI techniques (e.g., NLP, computer vision, generative models). Data Analysis & Large-Scale Computing Work with large datasets to uncover patterns and insights. Help run statistical tests, model validations, and performance tuning. Learn how models are scaled for real-time or high volume environments. Research & Innovation Stay up to date with AI trends and bring ideas to the team. Prototype new methods or tools that could improve model accuracy, speed, or usability. Collaboration & Integration Partner with data scientists, engineers, and product teams. Contribute to model handoff processes, documentation, and deployment readiness. Communication & Documentation Create clear summaries, visualizations, and presentations of your work. Document experiments, findings, and model behavior for team knowledge sharing. What are the requirements needed for this position? Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Math, Engineering, or related fields. Experience with Python and common ML libraries (e.g., scikitlearn, PyTorch, TensorFlow). Strong analytical and problem solving abilities. Interest in AI/ML techniques and how they apply to real world business needs. Ability to explain technical ideas in a clear, simple way. What other skills/experience would be helpful to have? Exposure to deep learning, optimization, or statistical modeling. Experience with large datasets or distributed computing tools (e.g., Spark, Kafka). Familiarity with GPU-based computing or cloud environments. Interest in areas such as generative AI, recommendation systems, NLP, or computer vision. Pay Range: $0.00 - $0.00 Any posted pay range considers a wide range of compensation factors, including candidate background, experience and work location, while also allowing for salary growth within the position. If there is no posting end date listed then this is a pipeline requisition, and we will continue to collect applications on an ongoing basis. Helping People Thrive in a Connected World Connect with us. Bring us your best work and your brightest ideas. And we’ll bring you a place where you can thrive. Learn more at jobs.assurant.com . For U.S. benefit information, visit myassurantbenefits.com . For benefit information outside the U.S., please speak with your recruiter. What’s the culture like at Assurant? Our unique culture is a big reason why talented people choose Assurant. Named a Best/Great Place to Work in 15 countries and awarded the Fortune America’s Most Innovative Companies recognition, we bring together top talent around the world. Although we have a wide variety of skills and experiences, we share common characteristics that are uniquely Assurant. A passion for service. An ability to innovate in practical ways. And a willingness to take chances. We call our culture The Assurant Way . Company Overview Assurant is a leading global business services company that supports, protects, and connects major consumer purchases. results.title: Telaprolu Kumar Koushik
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer @ Assurant | GPU Engineering, Causal Inference, Ontology engineering, Digital Twins, Fine-tuning, RAG.
...
AI ML Engineer at [Assurant](https://www.linkedin.com/company/assurant)
...
Hello Connections, I’m Kumar Koushik Telaprolu — a Master’s student in Computer Science at Indiana University with a passion for solving real-world problems through AI, machine learning, data-driven systems, Full stack webdeveloper (MERN). Currently, I serve as a Graduate Research Assistant at the Kelley School of Business, where I analyze decades of U.S. newspaper archives using sentiment analysis and deep learning. Our research, inspired by “(Almost) 200 Years of News-Based Economic Sentiment,” explores how historical news data reflects and influences economic behavior. I harness IU’s Big Red 200 supercomputer to process large-scale datasets and extract meaningful economic insights. In parallel, as an Associate Instructor, I support academic growth through hands-on teaching in Big Data Analytics and Python Programming, helping students translate theory into scalable systems. My journey is powered by a strong foundation in sentiment analysis, neural networks, and high-performance computing, backed by certifications from AWS and NVIDIA in GenAI and Accelerated Data Science. I’ve applied these skills across impactful projects — from building dietary recommendation systems like NutriSync to real-time multi-agent platforms like TAGE. Fluent in English, Telugu, and Hindi, I bring a multicultural lens to technical communication and collaboration. Outside of tech, I enjoy the strategic beauty of chess and the expressive art of photography — two passions that keep my creativity sharp. Let’s connect if you’re working on AI, GenAI, data science, or simply enjoy building systems that make a difference.
...

Designing and developing AI-driven simulation and decision-support software that models operational scenarios, evaluates KPI impact, performs target-seeking and constrained optimization, and generates recommendations for business decision-making. Developing and deploying machine learning and time-series inference services for KPI prediction, including model calibration, uncertainty estimation, sensitivity analysis, and validation. Implementing production FastAPI services, containerized deployments, Kubernetes-based infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, logging, and automated testing to support scalable and reliable systems. Collaborating in Agile development environments through sprint planning, stand-ups, technical reviews, and Azure DevOps tracking to deliver production-ready software aligned with project goals.

results.title: Assurant AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Assurant has positioned itself as a leader in AI transformation across the insurance and protection services industry. The company has deployed AI across multiple business functions including dynamic claims management, fraud detection, customer support, and mobile device lifecycle management[1]. Their AI initiatives span from sophisticated algorithms that adjudicate claims in seconds to AI-powered trade-in programs that returned a record $1.59 billion to customers in Q3 2025[2]. CEO Keith Demmings positioned 2026 as 'the year where tinkering becomes transformation'[3], signaling a shift from experimental AI to practical business impact. The company's approach emphasizes human-in-the-loop design to build trust while delivering enhanced customer experiences[4].
...

Developed and deployed machine learning models using Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch to detect anomalies, enabling early intervention programs that reduced neglect cases by 20%. Created interactive dashboards on Tableau and Power BI to visualize key metrics like program effectiveness, enabling data-driven decision-making for the organization. Automated model training and deployment processes using CI/CD pipelines on GCP, reducing deployment time by 40% and enhancing operational efficiency. Built scalable machine learning pipelines to process real-time data from IoT devices, enabling predictive maintenance and safety monitoring for at-risk services. Developed and implemented predictive models using machine learning algorithms such as linear regression, classification, multivariate regression, Naive Bayes, Random Forests, K-means clustering, KNN, PCA, and regularization for data analysis. This project focused on developing models like Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, Ranger, Bag
...
and Boosting to predict high
...
rates for Airbnb listings. The models were built using various machine learning algorithms, with the winning model being XGBoost. The models incorporated a wide range of variables, including accommodation details, cancellation policy, host details, availability, price, amenities, and external factors such as distance to the nearest airport and wage data. To evaluate the performance of the XGBoost model, the data was divided into training, validation, and test sets. The model was trained using the binary logistic objective function and tested on the separate test set. Performance metrics such as accuracy, AUC, confusion matrix, learning curves, and fitting curves were used to assess the model's generalization performance. The XGBoost model was selected as the winning model due to its high accuracy, AUC values, and its ability to capture complex patterns in
...
data. The developed models provide valuable insights into the factors driving high booking rates on Airbnb, making them useful for Airbnb hosts, property management companies, and investors in the short-term rental market. Hosts can optimize their listings based on the identified important factors, property management companies can make data-driven decisions about pricing and marketing strategies, and investors can identify properties with high potential for generating rental income. These models contribute to maximizing revenue and success in the short-term rental market. Show less

results.title: Lead Data Analyst (Customer Insights) | Remotepulse
highlights:
Lead Data Analyst (Customer Insights) | Remotepulse
...
# Lead Data Analyst (Customer Insights)
...
Assured is on a mission to modernize insurance. Claims processing (i.e. should we pay this claim?), while often overlooked, is the foundation of the entire industry. It’s currently highly manual, involving phone calls, faxes, and gut instinct, costing tens of billions of dollars a year. We can do better.
...
At Assured, we provide large insurers with the software solutions they need to win in a modern, technology-driven world. From self-service claim-filing software to backend fraud detection, we’re the engine that powers claims processing for some of the largest insurers in the world.
...
The challenges we face are deep and diverse, from creating digital experiences that provide comfort and clarity to claimants at their most stressed and vulnerable to orchestrating large-scale ML-driven decision-making on billions of dollars of claims payments, life at Assured is dynamic, collaborative, and rewarding.
...
We’re looking for a Lead Data Analyst who thrives on connecting the dots between customers, data, and decisions. You’ll sit at the intersection of insight and action, helping transform questions into strategies that move our business forward.
...
If you love asking “why?”, collaborating across teams, and using data to tell powerful stories, this role is for you.
...
What You’ll Do
...
Bridge business and data: Connect customers, Product, Sales, and Client Engagement, translating business needs into clear, measurable analytics.
...
Own the flow of insight: Lead requirements gathering, reporting alignment, and data storytelling to ensure analytics drive strategy.
...
Spot trends and tell the story: Surface patterns, gaps, and “what changed?” moments in customer data—and drive investigations to resolution.
...
Be the analytics voice in the room: Represent Product Analytics in key client and partner calls, turning feedback into actionable insights.
...
Deliver clarity through data: Collaborate with analysts to build dashboards and metrics that answer priority business questions.
...
Lead proactive discovery: Explore customer behavior, pilots, and trends to inform product and go-to-market strategies.
...
Champion customer-facing insights: Support initiatives like engagement portals and reporting, translating data into clear, compelling stories.
...
Elevate the craft: Partner with the Product Analytics team to ensure consistent, high-quality, and impactful outputs.
...
What You Bring
...
5+ years in Data Analytics. Business Analysis, Product Analytics, or other data-driven roles.
...
Proven experience gathering and documenting business/reporting requirements across diverse teams.
...
Fluency in reporting frameworks, dashboards, and data visualization writing in SQL.
...
⚙️ Comfort with ambiguity: You adapt quickly in evolving technical environments.
...
Strategic & hands-on: Confident moving from high-level discussions to deep analysis.
...
️ Exceptional communication:
...
executives and stakeholders.
...
Collaborative mindset: You’re a translator who listens, probes, and connects the dots.
...
Curiosity: You care about the why, not just the what.

results.title: Staff Data Scientist | Careerport
highlights:
# Staff Data Scientist
...
Assured is on a mission to modernize insurance. Claims processing (i.e. should we pay this claim?), while often overlooked, is the foundation of the entire industry. It’s currently highly manual, involving phone calls, faxes, and gut instinct, costing tens of billions of dollars a year. We can do better. At Assured, we provide large insurers with the software solutions they need to win in a modern, technology-driven world. From self-service claim-filing software to backend fraud detection, we’re the engine that powers claims processing for some of the largest insurers in the world. The challenges we face are deep and diverse, from creating digital experiences that provide comfort and clarity to claimants at their most stressed and vulnerable to orchestrating large-scale ML-driven decision-making on billions of dollars of claims payments, life at Assured is dynamic, collaborative, and rewarding. We’re looking for a Staff Data Scientist to help power the intelligence behind Assured’s platform. You will work closely with product managers, engineers, and claims domain experts to build machine learning systems that automate key parts of the claims lifecycle. This is a high-impact technical leadership role focused on building models that improve decision-making, automation, and operational efficiency. You will… Design models and systems that help automate and optimize claims handling, including; Liability prediction, Fraud detection, Document & image understanding. Partner with product and engineering teams to translate claims workflows into ML solutions ⚙️ Prototype production-ready models and data pipelines Dive deep on early stage products to scale product market fit Help shape the data science roadmap and architecture across Assured’s platform You have… Experience as a Staff or Principal Engineer with a focus on data science, machine learning, or applied AI Experience deploying production ML systems Strong skills in: Python, SQL, ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, XGBoost, etc.), and modern data platforms (Snowflake, Spark, etc.) Experience working with structured and unstructured data Ability to translate real-world business problems into ML solutions Experience collaborating with product and engineering teams ⚙️ Experience building decision systems or automation platforms Benefits: Competitive Compensation: Competitive salary and equity packages for all employees Healthcare Plan: Platinum medical, dental, and vision ️ Free life insurance: Including long-term disability & short-term disability Unlimited PTO: Uncapped vacation days & paid holidays Family Leave: Maternity & paternity 401(k) Contribution: Assured contributes 3% of your income, even if you don't contribute WFH Benefits: Lunch on us 2x/week, monthly phone stipend & other home office perks Health FSAs & HSAs: Pre-tax accounts for out-of-pocket medical expenses Team events & Offsites: We're remote, but we regularly get together **We have been made aware of individuals falsely posing as recruiters from Assured Insurance Technologies Inc. Please note that we only contact candidates from official @ assured.claims email addresses and all interviews are conducted through verified company channels. If you are unsure whether a message is legitimate, please contact us directly at, recruiting-ops@assured.claims before sharing any personal information ** Our Commitment: We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, perform essential job functions, and receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation. 

Apply To This Job

At AIG, we are making long-term investments in a brand-new, innovative Generative AI team, designed to explore new possibilities for how artificial intelligence can be applied in insurance and beyond, and we need your help.
...
With the support and investment needed to explore new frontiers in generative AI, you'll be working alongside talented colleagues, innovating and leading projects that will transform how we manage risk and serve our customers.
...
As a Data Scientist at AIG, you will serve a critical role in the architecture, development, and delivery of impactful enterprise-level Generative AI solutions. We are seeking a highly technical individual contributor with extensive hands-on experience, as we are an applied data science team operating in an agile and production-oriented environment. You will be focused on Large Language Models (LLMs) and Machine Learning (ML), acting as a primary technical driver for our most complex projects.
...
End-to-End Development: Lead the development and successful delivery of data science and generative AI solutions in accordance with business requirements.
...
Production Oversight: Monitor solutions in production to ensure performance, reliability, and accuracy.
...
Technical Collaboration: Partner with cross-functional teams including product managers, engineers, and business leaders to translate requirements into technical reality.
...
Evaluation & Quality: Build robust evaluation frameworks to measure LLM efficacy, manage ground truth dataset quality, and guide the product development roadmap.
...
Architecture: Design scalable ML pipelines and RAG frameworks that integrate seamlessly with enterprise data structures.
...
5+ years of experience in a data science role, with a strong emphasis on NLP and ML, working in an agile production-oriented environment.
...
Proven Delivery: Experience successfully delivering multiple GenAI, analytical, or ML projects from conception through to production.
...
Python Expertise: Strong, expert-level proficiency in Python and its data science ecosystem (e.g., PyTorch, Pandas, Scikit-learn).
...
LLM Mastery: 5+ years of practical experience with open-source Large Language Models (Llama 3, Mixtral, etc.), including prompt engineering, inference optimization, and fine-tuning.
...
GenAI Solutions: 3+ years of experience building Generative AI Solutions, including designing and building RAG frameworks, validation pipelines, observability, and monitoring solutions.
...
Education: Master's degree in data science, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.
...
Palantir Platform Experience: Hands-on experience or certification in the Palantir platform (Foundry/AIP).
...
Ontology Mastery: A strong understanding of Ontology—specifically how to map complex real-world data entities and relationships into a digital twin framework to power AI applications.
...
A "hands-on" mindset with the desire to be a primary technical lead through code quality and architectural excellence.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
